education_requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
key_responsibilities: Collaborate with team members to comprehend project requirements and contribute to the development of software and hardware applications.
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices.
Engage in the entire software and hardware development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment.
Create unit tests and participate in integration testing to ensure quality solutions.
Analyze and troubleshoot defects in software, providing effective solutions.
Document code and contribute to technical documentation.
Work closely with cross-functional teams, including product managers, designers, and QA engineers.
Participate in code reviews to improve understanding of code quality and standards.
Stay informed about industry trends and best practices to enhance skills.
relevant_data: Xtract One Technologies is a Canadian technology company specializing in threat detection and security solutions using AI.
The company has 74 employees and generates approximately $12.4 million in revenue.
Xtract One secured the CMT Awards in April 2024 for ensuring a safe event and was selected by the University of Michigan Health-West to enhance security.
Employee reviews indicate a positive work culture with a friendly and supportive environment, though some feedback on management is mixed.
